hero.badge: Coming soon — sign up to be notified at launch
hero.title: Stop searching for job offers.
hero.sub: Bye Bye Boss is under development. At launch: upload your resume once, our AI analyses your profile, explores thousands of offers and sends you a 100% relevant selection every day. Leave your email to be notified when we open.
hero.annotation: Every night, get the best opportunities for you.
hero.dash_meta: Top opportunities ranked by fit with your profile

waitlist.success: You're in. You'll be among the first to know. 👋
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
waitlist.note: Free. No commitment. Your email is only used to notify you of the opening.
waitlist.note_cta: Free. No commitment. Nothing sent before we open.

why.eyebrow: WHY YOU DON'T GET INTERVIEWS, OR REGRET YOUR CHOICES
why.title: The problem isn't always your profile.

profile.title: Good profile
profile.text: You have the required skills and experience.

ats.title: Poor ATS score
ats.text: Your resume doesn't highlight your strengths enough.

targeting.title: Poor targeting
targeting.text: You apply to offers too far from your goals.

regret.title: Regret risk
regret.text: The company or role could disappoint you mid-term.

how.title: How it will work at launch

upload.title: Upload your resume
upload.text: Import your resume as a PDF. It takes 30 seconds.

analyse.title: Our AI understands your profile
analyse.text: We analyse your skills, experience and goals in depth.

explore.title: We analyse the offers
explore.text: Our AI continuously explores thousands of offers across sources.

receive.title: You get your selection
receive.text: Every night, by email, the best opportunities that match you.

features.title: One email every night.
features.p1: Your daily selection lands straight in your inbox, with each offer's scores and the reasoning behind them. You open, you decide, that's it.
features.p2: The dashboard is only there when you need it: apply with a resume tailored to the offer, and track your applications.
features.mail_label: Example of the daily email you will receive
features.mail_greeting: Hi Thomas, here is your selection of the day 👋

comparison.title: We show you your chances… and the regret risk.

stats.funnel_title: We'll do the sorting for you
stats.funnel_note: Example selection on a typical profile. Save hours of searching.
stats.ats_title: Your resume may not be the problem.
stats.ats_sub: Sometimes a few adjustments change everything.
stats.regret_title: Don't miss out… or miss yourself.
stats.regret_sub: Our regret index will be based on real reviews from employees and ex-employees.
stats.regret_desc: Many negative reports about management, turnover and internal growth.
stats.regret_source: Data collected via Reddit and analysed by our AI
